title: Enhancing LLM Retrieval with Semantic Chunking Strategies
description: We propose novel semantic chunking strategies that improve retrieval accuracy in RAG systems by up to 23% compared to traditional fixed-size chunking methods.

title: Scalable Microservices Architecture for Real-Time Data Analytics
description: A reference architecture for building scalable microservices that handle real-time data analytics workloads with sub-second latency.

title: Automated Feature Engineering for Tabular Data Using Deep Learning
description: We introduce a deep learning approach for automated feature engineering that discovers complex feature interactions in tabular datasets.

title: A Survey of MLOps Practices in Enterprise Environments
description: A comprehensive survey of MLOps practices, tools, and challenges in enterprise environments, based on interviews with 50+ ML practitioners.
